findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 51. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: DEQ footer content (logo, address, phone number) is placed before the main body content in the HTML, disrupting the reading order from the PDF.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the reading order is: state seal + officials (header) → heading + agenda items (body) → DEQ logo + contact info (footer). In the HTML, the order is: state seal (header) → DEQ logo + contact info (footer) → officials listing → heading + agenda items (body). A sighted user reading the HTML top-to-bottom encounters the footer contact information before the body content.

findings.description: Second image in HTML has empty alt text (alt="") rather than a descriptive label. Based on the PDF, this corresponds to the NC DEQ logo that appears at the bottom of the pages.
findings.evidence: HTML: . The PDF shows the NC DEQ logo with text "North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality" at the footer of both pages.
